pr.title: [track_10min_16mb] LoRA TTT + SOTA Int5/Int6 (10L, BigramHash, SWA) — Atharva Date (ADIITJ)

output.summary: SOTA 10-layer Int5/Int6 stack adds document-isolated LoRA TTT at eval, resetting rank-8 Q/V adapters per doc while keeping the artifact unchanged.
output.valOnlyReasoning: Adapters are trained only during evaluation on validation documents using already-scored tokens, with no new training data stored.
techniques: Document-isolated LoRA test-time training on validation chunks
Chunk-level score-before-train flow with rank-8 Q/V adapters
Int5-MLP + Int6-Attn quantization and SWA tuning
